title: Advance Tax on Imports - Part I of 12th Schedule
notes: Goods classified in Part I of the Twelfth Schedule.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Part II of 12th Schedule (General)
notes: Goods classified in Part II of the Twelfth Schedule (Other than Commercial Importers).
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Part II of 12th Schedule (Commercial Importer)
notes: Goods classified in Part II of the Twelfth Schedule imported by a Commercial Importer.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Part III of 12th Schedule (General)
notes: Goods classified in Part III of the Twelfth Schedule (Other than Commercial Importers).
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Part III of 12th Schedule (Commercial Importer)
notes: Goods classified in Part III of the Twelfth Schedule imported by a Commercial Importer.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Pulses
notes: Persons importing pulses.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Coal
notes: Persons importing coal.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Imports - Ship Breakers
notes: Ship breakers on import of ships.
reference: Div II, Part II of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Regular Salary
notes: Deducted at the average rate of tax computed at the slab rates specified in Division I of Part I of the First Schedule. Tenth Schedule does not apply.
reference: Section 149(1), Div I, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(a)

title: Directorship Fee or Board Meeting Fee
notes: Tax deducted on gross amount payable for attending board meetings or directorship fee. Tenth Schedule does not apply.
reference: Section 149(3) & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(a)

title: Dividends from Independent Power Producers (IPPs)
notes: Where dividend is a pass-through item under an Implementation/Power Purchase Agreement.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Dividends from Mutual Funds (Debt Component)
notes: Mutual funds deriving 50% or more income from profit on debt.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Dividends from Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to REIT
notes: Dividend received by a REIT Scheme from Special Purpose Vehicle.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule

title: Dividends from Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to Others
notes: Dividend received by others from Special Purpose Vehicle as defined under REIT Regulations, 2015.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Dividends from Exempt Companies
notes: Person receiving dividend from a company where no tax is payable by such company due to exemption or carry forward of losses.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Dividends (Standard / General)
notes: In the case of REITs, Equity Mutual Funds, and all other cases not specifically mentioned.
reference: Div I, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Yield/Profit by Banking or Financial Institution
notes: Yield or profit paid by a banking company or financial institution on an account or deposit.
reference: Div IA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Yield/Profit on Govt Securities (Non-Individuals)
notes: Yield or profit on Government securities paid to any person other than an individual.
reference: Div IA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Yield/Profit on Debt (Other Cases)
notes: Yield or profit in all other cases, including Government securities paid to individuals.
reference: Div IA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Gain on Disposal of Debt Securities
notes: Deducted by custodian on gross amount of capital gain on debt securities.
reference: Div IIIAA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Royalty or Fee for Technical Services
notes: Tax deducted from gross amount paid. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply to this specific non-resident payment.
reference: Div IV, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Fee for Offshore Digital Services
notes: Deducted by banking company/financial institution remitting outside Pakistan. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div IV, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Execution of Construction/Assembly Contracts
notes: Deducted from gross amount payable on execution of contracts. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Insurance or Re-insurance Premium
notes: Deducted from gross amount paid. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Advertisement Services to Foreign Media
notes: Deducted from gross amount paid for relaying from outside Pakistan. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Foreign Produced Commercials
notes: Payment directly/indirectly for foreign produced commercials for TV/media. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Section 152(1BA) & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Capital Gain on Debt Instruments (via SCRA/FCVA/NRVA)
notes: Deducted from capital gain arising on disposal of debt instruments/Govt securities. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(b)

title: Sale of Goods by Permanent Establishment (Company)
notes: Payment to a PE in Pakistan of a non-resident company for sale of goods. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale of Goods by Permanent Establishment (Others)
notes: Payment to a PE in Pakistan of a non-resident (other than company) for sale of goods. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Specified Services by Permanent Establishment
notes: Transport, freight, IT, courier, hotel, tracking, ad services (non-media), car rental, building maintenance, inspection/certification by PE. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Other Services by Permanent Establishment (Company)
notes: Other services provided by a PE in Pakistan of a non-resident company. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Other Services by Permanent Establishment (Others)
notes: Other services provided by a PE in Pakistan of a non-resident (other than company). Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts by Permanent Establishment (Sportsperson)
notes: Contracts executed by a sportsperson's PE. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts by Permanent Establishment (Company)
notes: Contracts executed by a PE of a non-resident company. Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts by Permanent Establishment (Others)
notes: Contracts executed by a PE of a non-resident (other than company). Tenth Schedule penalty applies.
reference: Div II, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale of Rice, Cotton Seed Oil, or Edible Oils
notes: Payment for the sale of rice, cotton seed, or edible oils.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Toll Manufacturing (Company)
notes: Payment for toll manufacturing to a resident company.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Toll Manufacturing (Others)
notes: Payment for toll manufacturing to any other resident taxpayer.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: General Sale of Goods (Company)
notes: Payment for sale of goods (other than specified goods/toll manufacturing) to a resident company.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: General Sale of Goods (Others)
notes: Payment for sale of goods (other than specified goods/toll manufacturing) to any other resident taxpayer.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: FMCG, Fertilizer, Sugar, Cement, Steel, Edible Oil Distributors
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 24C applies only if the recipient is on the Active Taxpayers' List. Otherwise, standard applicable rates (10% or 11%) apply.
reference: Clause (24C), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Distributors of Cigarettes
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 24A.
reference: Clause (24A), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Distributors of Pharmaceutical Products
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 24A.
reference: Clause (24A), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale of Gold, Silver and Articles thereof
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 31.
reference: Clause (31), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Export-Oriented Sectors (Textile, Carpets, Leather, Surgical, Sports)
notes: Reduced rate on local sales, supplies, and services provided to zero-rated sectors under Sched 2 Part II Cl 45A.
reference: Clause (45A), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Specified Services (Transport, IT, Freight, Courier, Hotel, Security, etc.)
notes: Includes transport, freight, air cargo, courier, manpower outsourcing, hotel, security, IT & IT enabled services, tracking, non-media ads, share registrar, engineering, warehousing, car rental, building maintenance, PMEX/PSX services, inspection/certification.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Electronic and Print Media Advertising
notes: Payments made to electronic and print media for advertising services.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Other Services (Company)
notes: General services provided by a resident company.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Other Services (Others)
notes: General services provided by any resident taxpayer other than a company.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Oil Tanker Contractors
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 28F.
reference: Clause (28F), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Goods Transport Contractors
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 43E.
reference: Clause (43E), Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts (Sportsperson)
notes: Payment on execution of contract signed by a sportsperson.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts (Company)
notes: Payment on execution of general contracts to a resident company.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts (Others)
notes: Payment on execution of general contracts to any other resident taxpayer.
reference: Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Payments by Exporters / Export Houses
notes: Services of stitching, dying, printing, embroidery, washing, sizing, and weaving.
reference: Div IV, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Digital Transactions via Payment Intermediary
notes: Collected by payment intermediary on digital means / banking channels for locally operated e-commerce.
reference: Div IVA, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Cash on Delivery via Courier Service
notes: Collected by courier service from buyer under CoD terms on behalf of a seller.
reference: Div IVA, Part I of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Proceeds of Export of Goods
notes: Deducted by authorized dealers in foreign exchange. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div IV, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(c)

title: Export of IT Services/Software
notes: Proceeds of computer software or IT/IT-enabled services by persons registered with PSEB. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div IVA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(ca)

title: Export of Other Services
notes: Other services rendered outside Pakistan. Tenth Schedule penalty does not apply.
reference: Div IVA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 10(ca)

title: Rent of Immovable Property (Individual/AOPs)
notes: 0% up to Rs 300,000; 5% to 25% slab rates above Rs 300,000.
reference: Div V, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Rent of Immovable Property (Company)
notes: Gross amount of rent.
reference: Div V, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Prize Bonds or Crossword Puzzle
notes: Deducted on the gross amount paid.
reference: Div VI, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Raffle, Lottery, Quiz, or Promotional Prizes
notes: Deducted on the gross amount paid or fair market value of the prize.
reference: Div VI, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale of Petroleum Products
notes: Collected on the amount of commission or discount allowed to petrol pump operators.
reference: Div VIA, Part III of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Cash Withdrawal
notes: Applicable only to persons NOT appearing in the active taxpayers' list on aggregate daily withdrawals exceeding Rs. 50,000.
reference: Section 231AB

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (Up to 850cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (851cc to 1000cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (1001cc to 1300cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (1301cc to 1600cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (1601cc to 1800cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (1801cc to 2000cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (2001cc to 2500cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (2501cc to 3000cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Purchase/Registration of Motor Vehicles (Above 3000cc)
notes: Collected at the time of purchase or registration. Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Transfer of Motor Vehicles
notes: Fixed amounts based on engine capacity (Rs. 5,000 up to Rs. 120,000 for ATL). Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Leasing of Motor Vehicles
notes: Collected by leasing company/bank at the time of lease. Applicable only to persons not appearing in the Active Taxpayers' List.
reference: Section 231B(1A)

title: Advance tax on foreign domestic workers
notes: Collected by authority issuing/renewing domestic aide visa.
reference: Section 231C & Tenth Schedule

title: Advertising Agents
notes: Collected from brokerage or commission.
reference: Div II, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Life Insurance Agents
notes: Where commission received is less than Rs. 0.5 million per annum.
reference: Div II, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Online Marketplace
notes: Reduced rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 28C for a person running an online marketplace.
reference: Clause 28C, Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Other Agents (General)
notes: Persons not covered in other specific brokerage/commission categories.
reference: Div II, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Motor Vehicles - Goods Transport
notes: Based on laden weight (Rs 2.5 per kg for ATL).
reference: Div III, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Motor Vehicles - Passenger Transport
notes: Based on seating capacity and air conditioning (Rs 200 - Rs 1500 per seat for ATL).
reference: Div III, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Tax on Motor Vehicles - Private Vehicles
notes: Fixed rates varying by engine capacity (Rs 800 to Rs 120,000 for ATL).
reference: Div III, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Electricity Consumption - Commercial
notes: 10% up to 20k, Rs 1950 + 12% above 20k.
reference: Div IV, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Electricity Consumption - Industrial
notes: 10% up to 20k, Rs 1950 + 5% above 20k.
reference: Div IV, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Electricity Consumption - Domestic
notes: 0% below 25k, 7.5% for 25k or more. Section 235(1) states it does not apply to domestic consumers on ATL.
reference: Div IV, Part IV of First Schedule & Section 235(1)

title: Telephone Users (Landline)
notes: Collected where the amount of monthly bill exceeds Rs 1000.
reference: Div V, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Mobile/Internet Users
notes: Collected on the amount of bill or sales price of prepaid card/units.
reference: Div V, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale by Auction (General)
notes: Collected from gross sale price of property/goods sold by auction or tender.
reference: Div VIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale by Auction (Immovable Property & Train Management)
notes: Collected from gross sale price of immovable property or train management services.
reference: Div VIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Toll Lease (National Logistics Corporation)
notes: Concessionary rate under Sched 2 Part II Cl 24CB.
reference: Clause 24CB, Part II of Second Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value <= Rs. 50m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the seller. Non-ATL rate is fixed by Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div X, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Sale/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value > Rs. 50m to Rs. 100m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the seller. Non-ATL rate is fixed by Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div X, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Sale/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value > Rs. 100m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the seller. Non-ATL rate is fixed by Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div X, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Foreign-produced TV drama serial or play
notes: Collected by licensing authority per episode.
reference: Div XA, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Foreign-produced TV play (single episode)
notes: Collected by licensing authority.
reference: Div XA, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advertisement starring foreign actor
notes: Collected by licensing authority per second.
reference: Div XA, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Functions and Gatherings
notes: Collected from person arranging functions in marriage halls, hotels, marquees, clubs, etc.
reference: Div XI, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale to Distributors, Dealers or Wholesalers (Fertilizer)
notes: Reduced to 0.25% if appearing on both Income Tax and Sales Tax ATL.
reference: Div XIV, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Sale to Distributors, Dealers or Wholesalers (Other Items)
notes: Collected at the time of sale. Non-ATL rate is fixed by Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div XIV, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1

title: Sale to Retailers
notes: Collected from gross amount of sales to retailers. Non-ATL rate is fixed by Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div XV, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1

title: Purchase/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value <= Rs. 50m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the purchaser. Specific Non-ATL and Late Filer rates per Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div XVIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Purchase/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value > Rs. 50m to Rs. 100m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the purchaser. Specific Non-ATL and Late Filer rates per Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div XVIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Purchase/Transfer of Immovable Property (Value > Rs. 100m)
notes: Collected at the time of registering or attesting the transfer from the purchaser. Specific Non-ATL and Late Filer rates per Tenth Schedule.
reference: Div XVIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule Rule 1 and 1A

title: Remittance Abroad via Credit/Debit/Prepaid Cards
notes: Collected at the time of transfer of any sum remitted outside Pakistan.
reference: Div XXVII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Bonus Shares Issued by Companies
notes: Company to withhold 10% of bonus shares and collect tax equal to 10% of their value.
reference: Section 236Z & Tenth Schedule
